e1_sentence: Narrated Ibn Abbas
e2_sentence: I asked about the statement of Allah's Apostle: "You seem  to be the same person who was shown to me in my dream," and Abu Huraira  informed me that Allah's Apostle said, "When I was sleeping, I saw (in a  dream) two bangles of gold on my hands and that worried me

e1_sentence: Musailima Al-Kadhdhab came during the lifetime of the Prophet and started  saying, "If Muhammad gives me the rule after him, I will follow him.
e2_sentence: Musailima Al-Kadhdhab came during the lifetime of the Prophet and started  saying, "If Muhammad gives me the rule after him, I will follow him.

e1_sentence: Musailima Al-Kadhdhab came during the lifetime of the Prophet and started  saying, "If Muhammad gives me the rule after him, I will follow him.
e2_sentence: And he  came to Medina with a great number of the people of his tribe

e1_sentence: And he  came to Medina with a great number of the people of his tribe
e2_sentence: Allah's Apostle  went to him in the company of Thabit bin Qais bin Shammas, and at that time,  Allah's Apostle had a stick of a date-palm tree in his hand

e1_sentence: Allah's Apostle  went to him in the company of Thabit bin Qais bin Shammas, and at that time,  Allah's Apostle had a stick of a date-palm tree in his hand
e2_sentence: When he (i.e. the  Prophet) stopped near Musailima while the latter was amidst his companions, he  said to him, "If you ask me for this piece (of stick), I will not give it to  you, and Allah's Order you cannot avoid, (but you will be destroyed), and if  you turn your back from this religion, then Allah will destroy you
